phase_name: Backend hardening — 3 fixes from graphify trace

completed_tasks.name: Approval pipeline: tx + payload fidelity + entity-gating docs

remaining_tasks.name: Decide + commit the 3 fixes (currently uncommitted in working tree)
Audit frontend callers for API contract change (some 400 -> 404/409)

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to commit the 3 fixes and on which branch
human_actions_pending.context: ~50 fix files uncommitted in working tree on branch docs/paperless-dms-switch; persist on disk but not version-controlled

decisions.decision: Fix #1 scope = all 7 affected domains (SQL + sqlc regen + repo signatures + callers)
decisions.rationale: User chose full coverage over RLS-backstop or single-domain pilot

decisions.decision: Fix #3(B) routes apply*Change through domain ServiceInterface, not repos
decisions.rationale: Item/inventory optional fields are unexported; only the domain Create path applies them faithfully

decisions.decision: Fix #3(C) keeps gate at 8 entity types, documents exclusions in docs/APPROVAL_PIPELINE.md
decisions.rationale: Conservative call; excluded types are sub-resources/audit/view-state applied atomically with a gated parent

decisions.decision: Fix #2 maps *shared.DomainError sentinels at the boundary + sweeps 69 hardcoded-400 sites
decisions.rationale: Restores correct status codes (404/409/...) and Field location; apierror machinery was dead

decisions.decision: Used GSD debug workflow for all 3 fixes
decisions.rationale: User chose GSD workflow over direct edits per repo CLAUDE.md enforcement

next_action: Decide whether to commit the 3 fixes; if yes, commit on a branch off docs/paperless-dms-switch. Then audit frontend for the 400->404/409 contract change.
context_notes: Fixes originated from a graphify knowledge-graph trace of backend/ (graphify-out/, 8408 nodes). 6 query traces in graphify-out/memory/ document the diagnoses. All 3 fixes verified: go build/vet clean, relevant tests pass. The ONLY 2 failing tests (loan.TestService_Return_InventoryDeleted, jobs.TestCleanupConfig_RetentionPeriodUsage) were proven pre-existing via stash-test on a clean tree — NOT introduced by this work. Resolved debug sessions hold full root-cause + fix detail per fix. NOTE: this file previously held stale phase-62 (loans) state — overwritten 2026-05-31.
